scripts.desktop:clean: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ports=5174,8080,9000; foreach($p in $ports){$cons=Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($cons){$cons | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } catch {} }}}; Get-Process electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
scripts.desktop:zip: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$src='release/Aether Studio-win32-x64'; $zip='release/AetherStudio-win32-x64.zip'; if(!(Test-Path $src)){ throw 'Run npm run desktop:bundle first.' }; if(Test-Path $zip){ Remove-Item $zip -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path (Join-Path $src '*') -DestinationPath $zip"
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run desktop:bundle && npm run desktop:zip
scripts.desktop:dist:installer: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis portable
scripts.desktop:publish: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (-not $env:GH_TOKEN) { throw 'GH_TOKEN is required for publish.' }; npm run build; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npx electron-builder --win nsis --publish always"
